title: 6 in 10 women will develop heart disease or stroke by 2050, heart association projects
description: “We're just setting up a generation of people to move through life, having their cardiovascular events earlier and more severe."
content: “We're just setting up a generation of people to move through life, having their cardiovascular events earlier and more severe."
